name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Yale, IA's Farmers State Bank at 201 Main St provides banking services to the community.
description_long:
Located at 201 Main St in Yale, IA, this Farmers State Bank branch is a standalone banking location serving the Yale community. The branch is situated in downtown Yale and is readily accessible to local residents and businesses. While specific hours are not listed online, you can contact the branch directly or visit in person to confirm operating times.

This Yale location offers standard banking services including account opening, deposits, withdrawals, and general customer service. For service inquiries or account assistance, visit the branch at 201 Main St or speak with the banking professionals on staff.

For Yale residents and businesses, this Farmers State Bank branch provides convenient local banking solutions. Remember to bring a valid ID for account opening or verification purposes. The branch is your trusted local resource for banking needs.
